name: David Mizrachi
mainConcern: I've had lower back pain for 10 years. It gets worse when I sit for long periods at work. I've tried physio, chiro, and Pilates but nothing has lasted more than a few weeks.
previousInjuries: L4-L5 disc bulge diagnosed 2018. Mild sciatica on the right side.
currentMedications: Ibuprofen as needed (2-3 times per week)
sportsActivities: Used to run, stopped due to back pain. Currently doing light gym work.
goals: I want to be able to sit at work without pain, go back to running, and be active with my kids without worrying about my back.

name: Sarah Kaufman
mainConcern: Chronic neck pain and tension headaches that I've had for 5 years. They've gotten worse since working from home. I feel like my head is always pushing forward and my shoulders are rounded.
previousInjuries: Minor whiplash from car accident in 2020
goals: Stop the headaches, improve my posture (I hate how I look in photos), and be able to work a full day without neck pain.

name: Mike Rosenberg
mainConcern: Right knee pain that started 6 months ago during running. It's lateral knee pain that gets worse downhill and after 5km. I've been running for 15 years without issues until now.
previousInjuries: Left ankle sprain 2019 (fully recovered). Right IT band syndrome 2022 (resolved with rest).
goals: Get back to running 30km per week pain-free. I have a half marathon in 4 months and I can barely run 5km right now.

name: Noa Shapira
mainConcern: After two pregnancies (last one 8 months ago), my body feels completely different. My core feels disconnected, my lower back hurts every morning, and my posture has collapsed. I want to feel like myself again.
previousInjuries: Diastasis recti diagnosed postpartum. No other injuries.
exerciseFrequency: Rarely — hard to find time with two kids
sportsActivities: Was active before pregnancies — running and yoga
goals: Reconnect my core, fix my posture, get rid of the back pain, and eventually get back to being active. I want to be able to pick up my kids without pain.
